_comment: No secrets here. Credentials + ELEVENLABS_API_KEY come from the environment (.env in dev, or your service manager in prod). Audio is streamed live to the speaker via talkback (talkback.py) — no automations or owner account needed. Find your device IDs/MAC with: GET https://<nvr>/proxy/protect/api/bootstrap (see docs/CONTROLLING-UNIFI-PROTECT-AUDIO.md).
